kv.memory.broadside-v0-1-0-built-and-liv: Broadside v0.1.0 built and live-tested against mastodon.social 2026-07-17. Full federation working: Follow/Accept, signed Create{Note} delivery, hashtags, mentions, URL auto-linking. 20 source files, 12 tests, 3 fuzz targets. Profile page with content negotiation and auto dark mode. 184 beads tracked, 120+ security findings fixed across 6 codereview passes, 1 pentest, 1 Hati scan, fuzzing, and cargo audit.
kv.memory.code-review-gate-every-logical: Code review gate: every logical chunk of code generated or modified must be run through /codereview 3 times before proceeding. This is a hard rule in both AGENTS.md and CLAUDE.md.
kv.memory.codereview-findings-must-be-fi: Codereview findings must be filed as beads issues tagged codereview. Never discard or ignore review findings — they get tracked.
